supply_chain.dependencies: Third-party service providers for technology systems, cloud computing, data processing, and critical business operations
risks: Cybersecurity risks from third-party providers, system failures, concentration of critical services with third parties, offshore service providers

regulatory_risks: Consumer Financial Protection Bureau (CFPB) regulations
Liquidity requirements and stress testing
Regulatory capital planning and distribution restrictions
Capital requirements (Basel III, CET1, stress capital buffer)
Enhanced prudential standards for bank holding companies
Dodd-Frank Act requirements
Derivatives regulation (Title VII of Dodd-Frank, CFTC registration)
Resolution planning requirements (FDIC)
Data privacy regulations (GLBA, state laws including California Consumer Privacy Act)
Orderly Liquidation Fund assessments
Enhanced Prudential Standards for Category IV institutions
Compliance with Consumer Financial Protection Act, Truth in Lending Act, Truth in Savings Act
Dodd-Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act compliance
Climate change disclosure requirements
Community Reinvestment Act (CRA) requirements
Bank Secrecy Act and anti-money laundering (AML) regulations
Changes in tax laws and regulations
FDIC deposit insurance assessments and special assessments
Recovery planning requirements (OCC)
Data privacy and cybersecurity regulations
Economic Growth, Regulatory Relief and Consumer Protection Act (EGRRCPA) requirements
FDIC insurance and regulatory assessments
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions compliance
Dividend and share repurchase limitations
Federal and state banking regulations and supervision
Changes in accounting standards and financial reporting requirements
Community Reinvestment Act compliance
Executive compensation restrictions
Capital requirements under Basel III Final Rule and stress capital buffer requirements
Anti-money laundering and economic sanctions compliance
Potential regulatory actions and enforcement proceedings
Fair Credit Reporting Act (FCRA) requirements
Debit card interchange fee regulations (Durbin Amendment)
Federal Reserve supervisory stress tests
Broker-dealer and investment adviser regulations (SEC, FINRA)
Environmental regulations and climate-related disclosure requirements
Truth in Lending Act (TILA) and Truth in Savings Act compliance

sanction_risks: Trading with the Enemy Act sanctions
International Emergency Economic Powers Act sanctions
Office of Foreign Assets Control (OFAC) sanctions on restricted countries and persons
Potential exposure through commercial customer activities in sanctioned jurisdictions
Risks from transactions with sanctioned entities
